scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build:plugins
scripts.build:plugins: npm run build:codex && npm run build:opencode
scripts.check:plugins: npm run build:plugins && npm run test:plugins
scripts.test: npm run test:install-reference && npm run test:preview && npm run test:core && npm run test:plugins
scripts.test:plugins: npm run test:codex && npm run test:opencode
scripts.release:check: node ./scripts/check-workspace-versions.mjs && npm run validate:stages && npm test && npm run pack:dry-run
scripts.release: npm run check:plugins && npm run build && changeset publish
scripts.release:dry-run: npm run pack:dry-run && echo 'Dry run complete'
